attack_surface.exposure: Reflection-at-boundary walking arbitrary CLR objects into the uniform tree.
attack_surface.trust_boundary: Outbound wire crossing — Normalize fires on whatever a handler put into Data.Value.

attack_surface.exposure: Generic Walk<T> tree-walker reflecting on caller-supplied T to rehydrate domain types.
attack_surface.trust_boundary: Inbound wire data has already passed Wire.Read (depth-capped). T is caller-controlled, not wire-controlled.
mitigations: MaxReadDepth=64 on Wire.Read bounds the tree size
FromNormalized hook + path.Resolve canonicalisation via AuthGate
gaps: Walk itself has no internal depth cap — relies on Wire.Read for untrusted input. Acceptable today; flagged if a future inbound path bypasses Wire.

attack_surface.exposure: Per-type per-view property whitelist driving every wire emission.
attack_surface.trust_boundary: Outbound Out view is what crosses to receivers.
mitigations: json.Writer fail-closed default on unknown leaf type
gaps: Transparent fallback ships all public props for types with zero of the four tags — intentional, but a latent footgun for future domain types.

attack_surface.exposure: Pre-auth deserialiser; first contact with untrusted bytes.
attack_surface.trust_boundary: Any channel that hands bytes to plang serializer's Deserialize.
mitigations: Properties sidecar restricted to JSON primitives via ReadPropertyPrimitive
signature deserialises into a fixed-shape record, no polymorphism

summary: data-normalize lands structural normalisation cleanly. Both recursive new files (Normalize, Reconstruct.Walk) live behind bounded trust gates (own 128-depth cap; inherited 64-depth cap respectively). json.Writer's fail-closed default forecloses the STJ-reflection bypass that the OBP refactor was designed to eliminate. Attribute migrations on Identity/setting/Variable/path/http.Response are surgical; sqlite correctly switched to Store view. No critical/high findings open. Two design-aware notes captured (Tagged transparent fallback, BuilderPlannerFailed plan-dump baseline match).

security_comment.codeanalyzer_v3: Re-verified V1 close — json.Writer constructor threads _view, EndRecord uses it, CanonicalizationTests:101 fixture exercises Store-mode preservation of [Sensitive] PrivateKey. Clean.
security_comment.tester_v4: Relied on for baseline test counts and BuilderSanity determinism check.
